variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16798 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16798 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16798 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF55312 Air Filter, Secondary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16798
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF55312 Direct Flow® secondary air filter's technology offers better engine protection and lower maintenance costs within a smaller profile than conventional air filtration systems.
